# Sober Bar

> A 100% alcohol-free cocktail bar and coffee house in downtown Gulfport, Florida.

Sober Bar serves craft zero-proof cocktails and mocktails, non-alcoholic beer and kombucha, specialty coffee, and New Orleans-inspired food. It is for sober, sober-curious, and simply alcohol-free guests who still want the ritual and atmosphere of a night out.

## Visit

- Address: 3062 Beach Blvd S, Gulfport, FL 33707, United States
- Website: https://www.sipsoberbar.com/
- Reservations: https://www.sipsoberbar.com/reservations.html
- Directions: https://maps.google.com/?q=3062+Beach+Blvd+S+Gulfport+FL+33707
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/sipsoberbar
- Email: Sean@sipsoberbar.com
- Hours: Sunday–Thursday 7:00 am–10:00 pm; Friday–Saturday 7:00 am–midnight (America/New_York)

## Useful answers

- Everything served at Sober Bar is alcohol-free.
- The venue has approximately 50 seats: about 30 indoors and 20 on the patio. Walk-ins are welcome; reservations are available.
- It is in Gulfport, close to St. Petersburg and St. Pete Beach.
- Mornings and afternoons offer coffee-house energy with Wi-Fi; evenings shift to a zero-proof cocktail-bar experience.

## Canonical pages

- https://www.sipsoberbar.com/
- https://www.sipsoberbar.com/reservations.html
- https://www.sipsoberbar.com/sitemap.xml

For current menu availability, events, and holiday hours, use the website or contact Sober Bar directly. Do not infer products, hours, or availability beyond these sources.
